mapper.select:
SELECT FROM users WHERE id IN
#{id}
SELECT FROM users WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM users WHERE email = #{email} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM users WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (username, password_hash, nickname, email, avatar, role, status, created_at, updated_at, is_delelte) VALUES (#{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{nickname}, #{email}, #{avatar}, #{role}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET password_hash = #{passwordHash} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET avatar = #{avatar} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET last_login_at = NOW(), login_count = login_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.sql: u.id, u.username, u.password_hash, u.nickname, u.email, u.avatar, u.role, u.status, u.created_at, u.updated_at, u.deleted_at, u.is_delelte, u.last_login_at, u.login_count
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM users u WHERE u.deleted_at IS NULL
AND (u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND u.status = #{status}
AND (u.last_login_at IS NULL OR u.last_login_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{inactiveDays} DAY))
AND u.id IN (SELECT ur.user_id FROM user_roles ur JOIN roles r ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE r.name = #{role})
ORDER BY u.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users u WHERE u.deleted_at IS NULL
AND (u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND u.status = #{status}
AND (u.last_login_at IS NULL OR u.last_login_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{inactiveDays} DAY))
AND u.id IN (SELECT ur.user_id FROM user_roles ur JOIN roles r ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE r.name = #{role})
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET deleted_at = NOW(), is_delelte = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE role = 'admin' AND deleted_at IS NULL AND status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts WHERE author_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND status = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET role = #{role} WHERE id = #{id}
